# Explore all the official templates for Firebase Studio

<div class="video-container">
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/vWfoxcDETY0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Description

Check out and learn how to use one of our many templates for Firebase Studio covering lots of popular frameworks and languages. 

Firebase Studio → https://goo.gle/firebasestudio 


#Firebase 

Speaker: Rody Davis
Products Mentioned: Firebase,
